users_oidc_subject_issuer_uidx.name: users_oidc_subject_issuer_uidx
users_oidc_subject_issuer_uidx.where: "users"."oidc_subject" is not null and "users"."oidc_issuer" is not null

book_custom_metadata_values_single_value.name: book_custom_metadata_values_single_value_chk
book_custom_metadata_values_single_value.value:
(
        ("book_custom_metadata_values"."value_text" is not null)::int +
        ("book_custom_metadata_values"."value_number" is not null)::int +
        ("book_custom_metadata_values"."value_date" is not null)::int +
        ("book_custom_metadata_values"."value_boolean" is not null)::int
      ) <= 1

migration_runs_started_before_ended_chk.name: migration_runs_started_before_ended_chk
migration_runs_started_before_ended_chk.value: "migration_runs"."ended_at" is null or "migration_runs"."started_at" is null or "migration_runs"."ended_at" >= "migration_runs"."started_at"

bookmarks_user_book_pos_uidx.name: bookmarks_user_book_pos_uidx
bookmarks_user_book_pos_uidx.where: "bookmarks"."position_seconds" is not null and "bookmarks"."cfi" is null

user_book_status_finished_after_started_.name: user_book_status_finished_after_started_chk
user_book_status_finished_after_started_.value: "user_book_status"."finished_at" is null or "user_book_status"."started_at" is null or "user_book_status"."finished_at" >= "user_book_status"."started_at"
